heading: Support Our Challenge.
intro1: In the 2024 season, thanks to your warm support, our iGEM - Waseda team was able to successfully participate in the Jamboree competition in Paris. We competed with students from around the world, presented our project, and our efforts paid off with excellent results.
intro2: In the 2024 season, we received support from 63 people through crowdfunding, totaling 800,000 yen. Your cooperation has been a great support for our challenge. We would like to express our heartfelt gratitude once again.
intro3: Our activities involve research aimed at solving social issues and the challenge of international competitions to disseminate our results to the world. However,
intro4:
・The cost of purchasing reagents and equipment necessary for research
・Participation fees for international competitions
intro5: require a large amount of funding. It is difficult for students alone to cover these costs, and your support is a great support for our activities. We will continue to make daily efforts to produce results that contribute to society through synthetic biology research. If you sympathize with our activities, we would appreciate your support, even if it is a small amount.
return: We have prepared a small token of appreciation according to the amount of your support.
contact: We have sponsorship plans such as event implementation and logo placement, so please contact us for more details.
